qron_theme: Gold art-deco fashion — runway couture, vintage elegance
why: Luxury footwear is one of the most counterfeited categories in fashion, and resale marketplaces have no reliable way to separate genuine Valentino pieces from convincing fakes.
value: Every pair ships with a QRON identity that pairs a branded, art-directed tag with an on-chain record — protecting resale value, enabling warranty transfer, and giving Valentino a direct channel to every owner.

qron_theme: Gold marble classical — museum grandeur, candlelit prestige
why: Grail-tier timepieces like the Nautilus 5711 trade far above retail in a secondhand market riddled with service-part swaps, franken-watches, and sophisticated counterfeits.
value: A TrueMark™ NFC + QR seal anchors each watch to an immutable AuthiChain record, protecting the ~7-figure trading premium, enabling proof-of-ownership transfers, and turning every resale into an authenticated brand touchpoint.

qron_theme: Brown coffee beans — warm earth tones, artisanal craft
why: Premium single-origin coffees command huge premiums and are routinely cut with cheap beans or falsely labelled, eroding consumer trust in specialty and direct-trade brands.
value: Farm-to-cup provenance is anchored on-chain at each stage, proving origin, processing, and ethical sourcing claims to buyers and baristas and justifying the premium SKU price.

qron_theme: Cyan circuit board — futuristic tech, neon data streams
why: High-end consumer electronics are frequently cloned at near-perfect quality, confusing customers, damaging brand NPS, and overloading support with fraudulent warranty claims.
value: QRON identity verification replaces fragile serial stickers with a scan-to-authenticate experience, reduces warranty fraud, and unlocks onboarding / upsell flows directly from the package.

qron_theme: Teal clinical — sterile precision, biotech luminescence
why: Counterfeit and diverted vaccines directly endanger patients, and DSCSA mandates full unit-level traceability with instant audit readiness that legacy systems struggle to deliver.
value: AuthiChain provides DSCSA / FDA 21 CFR Part 11 compliant serialisation from line to pharmacy, with cold-chain checkpoints and instant recall queries, protecting patients and the manufacturer's licence to operate.

qron_theme: Blue glass architecture — gallery-grade, translucent depth
why: Blue-chip art and limited-edition prints rely on paper COAs that can be forged, lost, or decoupled from the work — undermining insurance, estate planning, and auction confidence.
value: An AuthiChain-anchored digital twin of the COA stays bound to the work through every sale, gallery loan, and estate transfer, preserving six- and seven-figure valuations and simplifying insurance underwriting.

product_name: La Mer Creme de la Mer
qron_theme: Pink neon nightlife — luminous beauty, urban glamour
why: Counterfeit prestige cosmetics can contain unsafe formulations, and grey-market diversion routinely undercuts department-store pricing and damages brand equity.
value: Per-jar QRON verification guarantees safety and batch integrity, protects premium pricing across authorised channels, and converts first-time scans into loyalty and refill subscriptions.

qron_theme: Blue lightning supercar — electric velocity, kinetic power
why: Counterfeit performance brake parts are a life-safety hazard and a liability minefield for OEMs and aftermarket distributors.
value: AuthiChain binds each caliper to its forge batch, torque-test record, and authorised installer network, giving insurers, track operators, and owners an auditable safety chain of custody.

qron_theme: Sports athletes — kinetic action, competitive precision
why: Tour-grade equipment is widely counterfeited in grey-market e-commerce, damaging sponsorships, pro-shop margins, and amateur player experience.
value: Authenticated tour-spec gear unlocks direct-to-golfer engagement, verifiable tournament compliance, and a loyalty loop every time a player scans to verify a dozen balls.

qron_theme: Industrial steel — machined textures, rotational symmetry, metallic gradients
why: Counterfeit industrial bearings cause catastrophic failures in wind, rail, and heavy-machinery applications — with multi-million-dollar downtime and safety consequences.
value: QRON identity verification lets maintenance crews confirm part provenance before installation, reducing warranty fraud and giving SKF a direct line into asset-level usage data.

qron_theme: Cannabis botanical — emerald greens, trichome frost, living soil earth tones
why: Cannabis consumers and dispensaries cannot easily verify seed-to-sale provenance, lab results, or licensed origin — exposing regulated markets to diversion and untested product.
value: StrainChain links every package to its cultivator licence, lab results, and terpene profile through an AuthiChain QRON, enabling compliant dispensary scanning, brand loyalty, and regulator-ready audit trails.
